'''Piranhas'''<ref name="ANH Novel">[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'' novelization]]</ref> were carnivorous [[Fish/Legends|fish]] with [[Color/Legends|green]] scales. They were found on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]<ref name="SSW 3" /> and [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. [[Ice Piranha|Another variety]] existed on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].<ref name="SSW 2" />

*''[[Super Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]''
